chapter_title.ar: بَابُ الْمُحْرِمِ يَشُدُّ عَلَى وَسَطِهِ الْهِمْيَانَ وَ الْمِنْطَقَةَ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 84 – The one in Ihraam tightens the money-purse and the belt upon his waist

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (7/286)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (7/286)

parts.text: أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ أَبِي نَصْرٍ

text: قُلْتُ لِأَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) إِنَّ مَعِي أَهْلِي وَ أَنَا أُرِيدُ أَنْ أَشُدَّ نَفَقَتِي فِي حَقْوَيَّ فَقَالَ نَعَمْ فَإِنَّ أَبِي ( عليه السلام ) كَانَ يَقُولُ مِنْ قُوَّةِ الْمُسَافِرِ حِفْظُ نَفَقَتِهِ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Sahl Bin Ziyad, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Abu Nasr, from Safwan Al Jammal who said,

‘I said to Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup>, ‘My family is with me, and I intend to tighten my expenses (purse) around my waist’. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Yes, for my<sup>asws</sup> father<sup>asws</sup> was saying: ‘From the strength of the traveller is the protection of his expenditure (money)’.
en.sarwar: 1. A number of our people have narrated from Sahl ibn Ziyad from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from ibn abu Nasr from Safwan al-Jammal who has said the following: “I once said to abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, that my family is with me and I need to carry around my loin something for my expenses with me. He (the Imam) said, ‘Yes, my father, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, would say that of the strength of a traveler are his supplies.’”
